query: /tech-debt-analyzer roadmap Create a 3-quarter tech debt reduction roadmap for our project
expected_behavior: Agent reads previous baseline from ~/.claude/tech-debt/ (prompts for scan if none exists)
Agent groups debt items into phased milestones: Quick Wins, Structural, Maintenance, Strategic
Agent maps phases to quarterly milestones across 3 quarters
Agent includes dependency ordering between debt items within and across phases
Agent provides estimated effort and success criteria for each phase
Agent includes progress metrics for tracking remediation over time
Agent does NOT implement any fixes
